scanDepth.label: Scan Depth
scanDepth.hint: Directory depth to scan for git repos when opening a root

batchConcurrency.label: Batch Concurrency
batchConcurrency.hint: Maximum repos to process in parallel (1-8)

restoreLastRoot.label: Restore Last Root
restoreLastRoot.hint: Reopen the last root directory on startup

repoColor.label: Git Repo Color
repoColor.hint: Highlight color for Git repository nodes in the file tree

autoScanGit.label: Auto Scan Git Repos
autoScanGit.hint: Automatically scan for Git repos when clicking a directory. When off, use the scan button manually
